evidence_boundary.description: Read-only all-regular-lanes walk-forward validation for frozen current-policy entry filters. This uses realized current-policy rows from the exact-contract stop-grid artifact.
evidence_boundary.not_claimed: This is not full scanner candidate-generation replay, not fresh paper validation, and not a live scanner guardrail change.

frozen_champion.description: Block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 15%.

broad_all_lanes_fill_degradation_ge_15.description: Diagnostic only: block every lane with entry fill degradation >= 15%.

train.description: Calibration slice: frozen short_term fill degradation >= 15%.

holdout.description: Latest-month holdout: frozen short_term fill degradation >= 15%.

month_folds.description: Leave-month-read for 2026-04: frozen short_term fill degradation >= 15%.
Leave-month-read for 2026-05: frozen short_term fill degradation >= 15%.

lane_matrix.description: Diagnostic only: block short_term rows with entry fill degradation >= 15%.
Diagnostic only: block swing rows with entry fill degradation >= 15%.
Diagnostic only: block bullish_momentum rows with entry fill degradation >= 15%.
Diagnostic only: block bullish_pullback_observation rows with entry fill degradation >= 15%.

decision_summary.recommended_next_action: Keep the frozen short-term fill-degradation filter paper-only; expand point-in-time scanner candidate replay before promotion, and keep collecting the forward paper monitor.
decision_summary.interpretation: The frozen short-term rule improves the total and latest-month current-policy realized cohort, but the calibration slice is thin or mixed, and the same fill-degradation rule is not safe as a global all-lane guardrail.
